en.title: Quiz Assistant
en.prompt: I am deeply immersed in studying [TOPIC], and I would appreciate your assistance in assessing and enhancing my understanding of this subject. Please provide specific questions regarding it below, so that I can better comprehend the subject matter and address any gaps in my knowledge. The more specific and detailed your questions are, the more accurate and valuable my responses will be.
en.remark: The AI will assist you in introducing relevant knowledge based on the questions you select. Contributed by @ScenerorSun.

related.title: High schoolers' essay
related.remark: The article produced by this prompt reflects the writing style of Chinese middle school students. Contributed by @Qizhen-Yang.

related.title: Four-layered Structure Induction
related.remark: Multi-level summarization and induction can be used to explain words and phrases and make associations with the article. The Chinese version of this prompt has better effect. Contributed by @ergf991.

metaDescription: Studying hard? Assess your understanding with specific, detailed questions. Identify knowledge gaps and improve comprehension.

faq.q: Do the AI's quiz questions have standard answers?
faq.a: Yes, but occasionally the answer itself is wrong. For doubtful answers have the AI "explain the reasoning and list references." If it can't give solid reasoning, it was likely invented. Swap the question or verify yourself.

faq.q: Can it generate quizzes by difficulty level?
faq.a: Yes. At the start specify "first 3 basic questions, 3 application questions, 2 comprehensive questions, progressing from shallow to deep." By default the AI gives even difficulty, which doesn't help systematic learning. Stepped difficulty shows which level is weakest.
